name: concept-design-framework
description: A static site generator built from independent concepts composed by declarative synchronizations.

scripts.example:build: bun run src/main.ts build --source example/pages --output example/dist --layouts example/layouts --public example/public
scripts.example:dev: bun run src/main.ts build --source example/pages --output example/dist --layouts example/layouts --public example/public --dev
